prompt: Here's a render of a castle for my game: /Users/jelle.vanelburg/fantasy-sprites/eval-workspace/test-inputs/castle_render.png. Turn it into a building sprite, and I also need an SVG version because my engine scales background assets.
assertions: A sprite PNG file is delivered in the outputs directory
An SVG file is delivered and is well-formed XML with an <svg> root element
The SVG preserves crisp pixel edges (shape-rendering crispEdges or equivalent integer-aligned rects)
The PNG sprite is building-sized: longest side is between 48 and 128 pixels
The sprite uses at most 16 unique opaque colors (pixel-art palette discipline)
Every opaque color in the sprite is an exact color from the house palette (assets/palette.txt)
Alpha is hard: every pixel is fully opaque or fully transparent (no semi-transparent fringe)
